definitions.usage_example: He went out despite the rain.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He went out despite the rain.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para mostrar un contraste o resultado inesperado (sinónimo de 'in spite of').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'in spite of').

definitions.usage_example: In addition to English, he speaks French.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in addition to AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: In addition to English, he speaks French.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para añadir otro ítem o pieza de información.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to add another item or piece of information.

definitions.usage_example: He went out in spite of the rain.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in spite of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He went out in spite of the rain.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para mostrar un contraste o resultado inesperado (sinónimo de 'despite').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'despite').

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: En nombre de / De parte de]
definitions.usage_example: I am speaking on behalf of my team.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE on behalf of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I am speaking on behalf of my team.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Como representante de alguien o para el beneficio de alguien.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As a representative of someone or for someone's benefit.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Sin importar / Independientemente de]
definitions.usage_example: He bought the car regardless of the cost.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE regardless of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He bought the car regardless of the cost.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para significar 'sin prestar atención a' o 'a pesar de'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mean 'without paying attention to' or 'despite'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Antes de / Previo a (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE prior to AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una forma formal de decir 'antes de' un tiempo o evento específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A formal way to say 'before' a specific time or event.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A diferencia de / En lugar de]
definitions.usage_example: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as opposed to AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para hacer un contraste directo entre dos cosas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to make a direct contrast between two things.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Con respecto a / Sobre]
definitions.usage_example: I have a question concerning your report.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have a question concerning your report.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Sobre el tema de o en conexión con; acerca de.]
definitions.usage_context_es: On the subject of or in connection with; about.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: En cuanto a / Con respecto a]
definitions.usage_example: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as for AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir un nuevo tema o cambiar de tema.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a new topic or change the subject.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Con respecto a / En cuanto a]
definitions.usage_example: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Con respecto a; en cuanto a.]
